settings.headline: There is a shape forming in the dark.
settings.subline: Uniforms for the individual, engineered with intention.

settings.label: I. Origin
settings.title: Annapolis, 1649
settings.copy: Where the bay meets the breakdown. Every piece starts there.

settings.label: II. Framework

settings.label: III. Radio

settings.copy: Each drop ships with a tracklist. The music is the context.
